instagram.biography: Shop from lots of local artists, makers and creatives who use our “store without a front” to sell their work, making it simple to shop from one place.

post_data.caption:
2026 Market Dates- Apply now! Shoppers mark your calendars!
.
The 2026 Folk & Bespoke events calendar is LIVE, complete with brand-new venues alongside our much-loved regulars. This means even more opportunities to showcase beautiful handmade creations and connect with our growing community.
.
Apply via the website… or use the links below.
.
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/2026-apply-now/
.
Keep an eye out for the full list of dates and locations on our website [www.folkandbespoke.com] and make sure to mark your diaries nice and early. 
.
Here are the individual links to apply...... 
.
1. Website application form 
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/shop-signup/ 

1. Firstsite Colchester 
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/colchester-firstsite.../ 

2. Leigh Community Centre 
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/leigh-community-centre.../ 

3. Ware Drill Hall, Ware 
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/drill-hall-application.../ 

4. Rayleigh Mill Hall 
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/rayleigh-mill-application... 

5. Brighthelm Centre, Brighton 
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/brighthelm-centre.../ 

6. Bomba on The Quay, Exeter 
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/bomba-exeter-application...

7. Chelmsford Cathedral, Chelmsford 
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/chelmsford-cathedral.../ 

8. Umbrella Centre, Whitstable 
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/whitstable-umbrella.../ 

9. New Windmill Hall, Upminster 
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/the-new-windmill-hall.../ 

10. The Alexander Centre, Faversham 
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/the-alexander-centre.../ 

11. King Charles The Martyr, Tunbridge Wells 
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/king-charles-the-martyr... 

12. Cliffs Pavilion, Westcliff-on-Sea 
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/cliffs-pavilion.../

13. Lewes Town Hall, Lewes
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/lewes-town-hall-lewes...

14. Felixstowe Leisure Centre, Felixstowe
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/felixstowe-leisure-centre.../

15. The Forum, Norwich
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/the-forum-norwich...

16. Alresford Living History Festival, Colchester
https://www.folkandbespoke.com/colchester-living-history.../
.
#folkandbespoke #shoplocal #artisanmarket #community #handmade

ONE WEEK TO GO!
.
🎨 Folk & Bespoke Craft Fair - Leigh-on-Sea 🧵
Join us for a day full of creativity, craftsmanship, and community spirit at Leigh Community Centre

🗓 Saturday 13th June 2026
🕙 10 AM – 3 PM
📍71-73 Elm Road, Leigh-on-Sea SS9 1SP
💰 Free Entry!

Discover a wonderful selection of handmade gifts, art, home décor, and treats made by talented local artisans. Whether you're looking for unique presents or just want to browse and be inspired, there’s something for everyone!

☕ Meet the makers and support small independent businesses.
🚲 Pop along, say hello, and make a day of it!
.
👉 More information: www.folkandbespoke.com
.
 #folkandbespoke #shoplocal #artisanmarket #handmade #community

Drop your social links and connect with another member today!
.
Let’s grow our creative community together! Drop your social media links below and take a moment to connect with at least one other member in the thread. Whether it’s Instagram, Etsy, TikTok, or your website, this is the perfect chance to support each other, discover new makers, and build meaningful connections. Who knows what collaborations or friendships might spark!
.
#folkandbespoke #shoplocal #artisanmarket #handmade #community

A happy customer is the best business strategy of all!
.
Nothing screams success like a happy customer! What’s the best review you’ve ever had as a small business or maker? Let us know in the comments and let’s start spreading the positivity. Also, if you've bought from anyone recently, please share your purchases and tag the talented maker too!
.
#folkandbespoke #shoplocal #artisanmarket #handmade #community

Small businesses thrive when people choose them on purpose. 
.
Thank you for supporting independent makers and for being part of the Folk & Bespoke community. 
.
We couldn’t do this without you.
.
#folkandbespoke #shoplocal #artisanmarket #handmade #community

Showcase your most summery or sunshine-inspired product.
.
Summer vibes are in the air! What’s your most summery, sunshine-inspired creation? Whether it’s bright colours, breezy designs, or something that just makes you think of long, warm days, share a photo and tell us what makes it perfect for the season. Let’s fill the feed with sunny creativity and good vibes! 
.
#folkandbespoke #shoplocal #artisanmarket #handmade #community
